bio: Olive is a very special senior cat who spent her life on the streets before moving into foster care in May 2024 when she fell ill. She is incredibly affectionate and loves human company and cuddles. Olive has a few manageable medical conditions, including hyperthyroidism (controlled with daily medication) and the need for regular check‑ups following tumour removal. She enjoys a good quality of life and is a very happy girl. With her foster travelling frequently, we would love to find Olive a forever home where she can receive the consistent care and love she deserves.
